targets.query:
from(bucket: "weather_lis")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather.station" and r._field == "wind_speed_kts")
  |> group(columns: ["station_name"])

from(bucket: "weather_lis")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather.station" and r._field == "wind_dir")
  |> group(columns: ["station_name"])

from(bucket: "weather_lis")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather.station" and r._field == "wind_gust_kts")
  |> group(columns: ["station_name"])

from(bucket: "weather_lis")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather.station" and r._field == "wind_speed_kts" and r["zone"] == "CT")
  |> mean()
  |> group()

from(bucket: "weather_lis")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather.station" and r._field == "wind_speed_kts" and r["zone"] == "LI")
  |> mean()
  |> group()

panels.title: CT vs LI — Différentiel de vent (kts)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "weather_lis")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather.station" and r._field == "pressure_hpa")
  |> group(columns: ["station_name"])

from(bucket: "weather_lis")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather.station" and (r._field == "wind_speed_kts" or r._field == "wind_dir" or r._field == "wind_gust_kts"))
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey:["station_name"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> keep(columns:["station_name","zone","wind_dir","wind_speed_kts","wind_gust_kts"])

from(bucket: "weather_lis")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather.station" and r._field == "wave_height_m")
  |> group(columns: ["station_name"])

from(bucket: "weather_lis")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather.station" and r._field == "wave_period_s")
  |> group(columns: ["station_name"])

from(bucket: "weather_lis")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather.station" and r._field == "wave_dir")
  |> group(columns: ["station_name"])
